title: Touch Nightlight Air
description:
## Contents
- Technical Data
Power Supply
Commissioning Air
Programming
Functions
- Alarm clock
- Set alarm time
- Time format
- Display brightness
- Temperature display
- Downloads

inputs.name: Buttons 1-5
inputs.description: These inputs are hidden by default and can be displayed via the properties of the device.

inputs.name: Button 6
inputs.description: This input is controlled via the upper middle button on the Touch Nightlight Air.

outputs.name: Smart Actuator RGBW
outputs.description: RGBW Lighting output for the Backlight on the Touch Nightlight Air. This is a standard Smart Actuator output to be used with a Lighting controller.

outputs.name: Dimmer RGB
outputs.description: Combined RGB output. This only appears if the device is set to “standard” type.

outputs.name: Dimmer WW
outputs.description: WW output. This only appears if the device is set to “standard” type.

outputs.name: Temperature
outputs.description: Displays the temperature from different sensors. If used it will swap between it every 5 seconds.
